name: Halves Sharp pow 3
description: Strong sharpening (exponent 3). Tension 0.3 becomes 0.027, 0.9 stays at 0.729. Highly selective learning — only the most tensioned neurons learn significantly.

config.description: Exponent 3 creates strong selectivity: neurons with tension 0.3 effectively get lr*0.027 while 0.9 gets lr*0.729 — a 27x ratio. This should concentrate learning on winner neurons if any exist.
